English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Charles Lewis Bowman photographs and drawings
Bowman, Charles Lewis, 1890-1971.
3807
8 cubic feet. 8 cubic feet.
1917-1962. Photographs, drawings Photographs and architectural drawings of houses designed or altered by Charles Lewis Bowman. Collection material in English 2069206
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Nancy Dean
Date completed:
November 1987
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez, September 2003
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, March 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Charles Lewis Bowman was an architect who designed many homes in Bronxville, New York and elsewhere.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Photographs and architectural drawings of houses designed or altered by Charles Lewis Bowman.
Cite As:
Charles Lewis Bowman photographs and drawings, #3807. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Architectural drawings. Photographs. Architecture -- New York (State) -- Bronxville.
2069206 <<<<<<< HEAD Series I. Photographs
Scope and Contents
Photographs of houses designed or altered by Lewis Bowman; the photographs are mainly the work of John Wallace Gillies ca. 1885-1927.Bartlett, Edward R. - 512 Orchard Place, Bronxville, N.Y.41Bates, E. E. - near Central Ave., Scarsdale, N.Y.31Black, Charles - 14 Eastway, Bronxville, N.Y.41Bliss, Julius - 21 Elm Rock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.71Boardman, Phillip W., Jr.- 176 Old Bedford Road, Greenwich, Ct.4Includes digital copies on DVD-1070 and DVD-10717Bondy, Richard C. - Goldens Bridge, N.Y.281Bowman, Mrs. Charles - 20 Oriole Ave., Bronxville, N.Y.51Bowman , Lewis - Eastland and Esplanade, Pelham Hgts., N.Y.51Bowman , Lewis - 136 Foster Ave., Mt. Vernon, N.Y.8.1Bowman , Lewis - 330 Pondfield Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.41Bowman , Lewis - 5 Elm Rock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.202Bowman, Milton S. - 15 Eastway, Bronxville, N.Y.32Cloister Inn - Princeton , N.J.72Corman, S. Wilbur - 5 Rittenhouse Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.62Eygaboard, Mrs. C. C. - 10 Hemlock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.42Gibson, Charles R. - 3 Elm Rock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.102Glorney, Miss Ethel M. - Manhhasset, L.I.52Graham, Roy C. - 935 Kimball Ave., Bronxville, N.Y.202Harvey, W. C. - Plainfield, N.J.13Harwood, Frank - 247 Pondfield Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.13
Scope and Contents
1 interior and 12 exterior 8" x 10" photographInterior: Living room with fireplace and furniture3Front of house with trees3Close up of front of house and living room window3Front door, glossy3Front door, matted print3Corner of house, driveway & schrubs3Rear of house from street3Rear driveway from street, gate open3Rear driveway from street, gate closed3Rear yard looking toward back doors3Rear yard looking toward closed gates and wall3Garden wall and door, glossy print3Garden wall and door, matted print3Harz , Alex - Beechmont Park, New Rochelle, N.Y.23Hastings, Herbert - 15 Hawthorne Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.73Hellman, Richard - 54 Butler Rd., Scarsdale, N.Y.113Impink, Irvin F. - Wyomissing Pk., Reading, Pa.83Irving , A . J . - 5 Courseview Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.23Jewett, J. H. - Wood End Lane, Bronxville, N.Y.23Jones, Robcliff V. - 6 Beechwood Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.193Kelly, Mrs. John T. - Heathcote Rd., near White Plains Rd. Scarsdale, N.Y.73Kilburn, C. D. - Glen Ridge, N.J.43Leinbach, Henry M. - Wyomissing Pk., Reading, Pa.63Maltby, Ralph B. - 31 Masterton Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.93McDonald, D. G. - 8 Eastway, Bronxville, N.Y.164McKee, Neal T. - 19 Return Bend Lane, Bronxville, N.Y.94McKee or Hastings (same#'s as Kilburn) -34Morden, William J. - 47 Masterton Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.74Morse, Henry N. - 9 Elm Rock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.164Ohrstrom, George L - Old Mill Rd., Greenwich, Ct.184Peck, Albert - 41 Masterton Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.14Pennell, Henry Beaumont - 33 Elm Rock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.54Quantrell, Ernest E. - 5 Leonard Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.34Roebling, Robert C. - Lawrenceville, N.J.235Schaff, Frederick - 27 Masterton Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.205Slattery, John J. - 15 Eastway, Bronxville, N.Y.45
Processing Information
Photographs mistakenly labeled as 16 Eastway. Error identified by current property owners (2020-10-16) of property: "The four pictures that were sent and are listed as 16 Eastway are actually pictures of 15 Eastway. Charles Lewis Bowman was the architect for both houses. We currently own and live in 16 Eastway." The physical items are labeled as 16 Eastway so it's quite possible that the original photographer got confused and labeled the pictures incorrectly.Streat, Herbert G. - 8 Elm Rock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.95Troxell, Edward - Beechwood Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.45Van Patten, L. A. - Pelham Hgts., N.Y.25Wardv Benjamin I. - Englewood, N.J.85Weihman, Clifford T. - 401 Monterey Ave., Pelham Manor, N.Y.55Whitfield, George P. - 27 Hampshire Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.35Wilkin, Ray T. - 9 Beechwood Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.651 print Christopher Wren16Unidentified, or partially identified, photographs5 Orchard Place # B5189-9136Pelham, N.Y. # 727069, -7426Unidentified # 1509-116Unidentified # 154226Unidentified # 154316Unidentified # 154416Unidentified # 154626Unidentified # 161436Assorted 8 x 10 photographs of Bowman architecture prepared for publication in "Your Home", 1952. [35 duplicates, 2 not duplicates, per H. Applegate. 1-28-81]376Volume Monographie du Palais de Compeigne Meuble, Bronzes, Decorations6Volume Monographie du Muses de Cluny Epoques: Gothique, Renaissance, Louis XIII a Louis XVI6Photo with overlay showing location of houses built by Lewis Bowman and map of Bronxville area6Thesis: Lewis Bowman and the Jacobethan Revival by Peter Flagg Maxson, May, 1975.7Miscellaneous photos, negatives, real estate advertising material.7Miscellaneous photos, negatives, real estate advertising material.8Series II. Scope and Contents
Photographs of houses designed or altered by Lewis Bowman; the photographs are mainly the work of John Wallace Gillies ca. 1885-1927.Bartlett, Edward R. - 512 Orchard Place, Bronxville, N.Y.41Bates, E. E. - near Central Ave., Scarsdale, N.Y.31Black, Charles - 14 Eastway, Bronxville, N.Y.41Bliss, Julius - 21 Elm Rock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.71Boardman, Phillip W., Jr.- 176 Old Bedford Road, Greenwich, Ct.4Includes digital copies on DVD-1070 and DVD-10717Bondy, Richard C. - Goldens Bridge, N.Y.281Bowman, Mrs. Charles - 20 Oriole Ave., Bronxville, N.Y.51Bowman , Lewis - Eastland and Esplanade, Pelham Hgts., N.Y.51Bowman , Lewis - 136 Foster Ave., Mt. C. - Plainfield, N.J.13Harwood, Frank - 247 Pondfield Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.13

Processing Information
Photographs mistakenly labeled as 16 Eastway. Error identified by current property owners (2020-10-16) of property: "The four pictures that were sent and are listed as 16 Eastway are actually pictures of 15 Eastway. Charles Lewis Bowman was the architect for both houses. We currently own and live in 16 Eastway." The physical items are labeled as 16 Eastway so it's quite possible that the original photographer got confused and labeled the pictures incorrectly.Streat, Herbert G. - 8 Elm Rock Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.95Troxell, Edward - Beechwood Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.45Van Patten, L. A. - Pelham Hgts., N.Y.25Wardv Benjamin I. - Englewood, N.J.85Weihman, Clifford T. - 401 Monterey Ave., Pelham Manor, N.Y.55Whitfield, George P. - 27 Hampshire Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.35Wilkin, Ray T. - 9 Beechwood Rd., Bronxville, N.Y.651 print Christopher Wren16Unidentified, or partially identified, photographs5 Orchard Place # B5189-9136Pelham, N.Y. # 727069, -7426Unidentified # 1509-116Unidentified # 154226Unidentified # 154316Unidentified # 154416Unidentified # 154626Unidentified # 161436Assorted 8 x 10 photographs of Bowman architecture prepared for publication in "Your Home", 1952. [35 duplicates, 2 not duplicates, per H. Applegate. 1-28-81]376Volume Monographie du Palais de Compeigne Meuble, Bronzes, Decorations6Volume Monographie du Muses de Cluny Epoques: Gothique, Renaissance, Louis XIII a Louis XVI6Photo with overlay showing location of houses built by Lewis Bowman and map of Bronxville area6Thesis: Lewis Bowman and the Jacobethan Revival by Peter Flagg Maxson, May, 1975.7Miscellaneous photos, negatives, real estate advertising material.7Miscellaneous photos, negatives, real estate advertising material.8Series II.
